text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take a walk with Oguri Cap during our lunch
break, but she doesn't seem to have much energy.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Sorry... Lately, no matter how much I sleep or eat,
I always seem to be out of energy...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Maybe I need to eat more... Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All those consecutive races must have taken their
toll. I should probably adjust her schedule to
avoid any further problems.
